# SubscriptionOfferEligibility | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ App Store Connect API ](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi)

- [ SubscriptionOfferEligibility ](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionOfferEligibility)

-  SubscriptionOfferEligibility 

Type# SubscriptionOfferEligibility

App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
string SubscriptionOfferEligibility
```

## [ Possible Values ](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionOfferEligibility#possibleValues)

`STACK_WITH_INTRO_OFFERS``REPLACE_INTRO_OFFERS`## [Possible values](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionOfferEligibility#Possible-values)

`STACK_WITH_INTRO_OFFERS`A subscription offer than can be combined with an introductory offer.

`REPLACE_INTRO_OFFERS`A subscription offer than repalces an introductory offer.

## [See Also](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionOfferEligibility#see-also)
